access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities.
access_attempts.notes: Extraction uses abstract-level results for this baseline pass.

name: The phosphodiesterases type 5 inhibitor tadalafil reduces the activation of the hypothalamus-pituitary-adrenal axis in men during cycle ergometric exercise.
venue: American Journal of Physiology-Endocrinology and Metabolism
summary: Double-blind crossover trial in 14 healthy males testing two tadalafil 20 mg doses over 36 hours before maximal cycle exercise, measuring exercise performance/cardiorespiratory parameters and endocrine stress-axis responses.
